---
title: "covid_cleaned"
format: html
---
#load data 
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)

covid <- read_csv("Provisional_COVID-19_Deaths_by_Sex_and_Age_20260407.csv") 
```

#clean data 
```{r}
library(janitor)

covid <- clean_names(covid)

covid <- filter(state == "United States")
```

```{r}
write.csv(covid, "covid.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
